title: jasminum amoenum
intro: Jasminum amoenum, also known as the fragrant jasmine or Chinese jasmine, is a type of flowering plant native to China. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Jasminum amoenum include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of digestive issues. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
